corrections.text: The article quotes RFC #3931 as saying Maintainers in Residence "split their time between team priorities and individual priorities of their choosing within their area of focus." Those exact words are not in the RFC; the source actually reads, "Maintainers' in Residence time is split between priorities guided by the teams they are supporting and priorities of their own choosing within the project." The article's meaning is accurate, but the passage is a paraphrase presented inside quotation marks, and "within their area of focus" should read "within the project."
